headline: Bernstein Maintains Outperform on L3Harris (LHX) as Revenue Tops Estimates
summary: L3Harris Technologies, Inc. (NYSE:LHX) is included among the 10 Best Stocks to Buy Now for a $1 Million Portfolio. On May 4, Bernstein analyst Douglas Harned lowered the firm’s price recommendation on L3Harris Technologies, Inc. (NYSE:LHX) to $405 from $435. It reiterated an Outperform rating on the shares. The firm pointed to the company’s first-quarter […]
